title: Directions under Section 35 A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (AACS) – Nagar Sahakari Bank Ltd., Etawah
description: It is hereby notified for information of the public that in exercise of powers vested in it under sub section (1) of Section 35 A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (As Applicable to Co-operative Societies), the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) vide Directive Ref. No. LKO.DOS.SED.No S29 /12-03-000/2026-2027 dated May 15, 2026, has issued certain Directions to Nagar Sahakari Bank Ltd., Etawah (“the bank”), whereby, as from the close of business on May 18, 2026, the ba
